 {"id":"bd-1pa8","title":"TEST-CORE: Protocol + crypto no-mock unit suites","description":"# TEST-CORE: Protocol + crypto no-mock unit suites

## Goal
Provide real-component unit tests for protocol framing, canonical CBOR, and crypto verification without mocks.

## Scope
- fcp-core: ObjectId derivation, approvals/receipts, revocation freshness logic.
- fcp-protocol: FCPS/FCPC parsing, length/flag validation, replay protection.
- fcp-crypto: Ed25519, X25519, HPKE seal/unseal, HKDF key schedule.
- fcp-cbor: canonicalization and schema hash prefixes.

## Constraints
- Use actual implementations; no stub crypto or fake framing.
- Prefer golden vectors and property tests over mocks.

## Acceptance Criteria
- New unit suites run with no mocks/fakes.
- Negative tests cover malformed frames, invalid signatures, and HPKE AAD mismatches.
- Coverage increases for protocol/crypto hot paths.

 {"id":"bd-1pdk","title":"[IDEA-12.3] Log harness tests","description":"## Goal
Add unit tests for the log harness itself.

## Details
- Validate schema errors are surfaced cleanly.
- Ensure malformed JSON lines are handled.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Harness tests pass deterministically.","notes":"Added LogCapture tests in fcp-testkit/tracing_config.rs (valid tracing JSONL + schema validation, invalid JSON/missing fields). cargo fmt/check ok; cargo check ok; cargo clippy ok. cargo test -p fcp-testkit fails due to preexisting build errors: fcp-manifest RateLimit missing pool_name (lib.rs:1338) and fcp-core ambiguous_glob_reexports warning.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"PurpleBeaver","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:39:42.025519459Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T21:31:04.952264680Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T21:31:04.952197696Z","close_reason":"Completed tests; blocked by unrelated build errors in fcp-manifest during test run","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1pdk","depends_on_id":"bd-3bus","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:39:42.035771137Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1qwu","title":"[IDEA-18.1] Implement policy simulation harness + CLI","description":"## What
Implement a `fcp policy simulate` command and a reusable test harness API.

## How
- Load relevant mesh objects (ZonePolicy, CapabilityToken, RevocationHead, ApprovalTokens).
- Evaluate using policy engine; emit DecisionReceipt JSON.
- Ensure no write paths are exercised.

## Success Criteria
- CLI accepts a JSON InvokeRequest and prints DecisionReceipt + evidence list.

## Acceptance Criteria (Refined)
- CLI accepts JSON InvokeRequest and returns DecisionReceipt JSON.
- Every deny includes `reason_code` and evidence ObjectIds.

-{"id":"bd-1r09","title":"[POL] CLI workflow (bundle/diff/preview/apply/rollback)","description":"# [POL] CLI workflow (bundle/diff/preview/apply/rollback)

## Goal
Expose policy bundle workflows via CLI for operators and CI.

## Commands
- `fcp policy bundle create --zone <id> --from <current> --sign`
- `fcp policy bundle diff <old> <new>`
- `fcp policy preview --bundle <id> --samples <file>`
- `fcp policy apply <bundle>` / `fcp policy rollback --to <bundle>`

## Output Requirements
- JSON and human outputs; stable ordering.
- Non-zero exit codes on validation or preview failures.

## Tests
- Unit tests for CLI parsing + output formatting (snapshots).
- Integration tests with test bundles and preview fixtures.
- Structured JSON logs for each stage (create/diff/preview/apply/rollback).

## Acceptance Criteria
- CLI outputs are deterministic and actionable.
- Rollback is one command and emits an audit event.","notes":"Progress: implemented bundle CLI create/preview/apply/rollback plumbing in fcp-cli policy module; apply/rollback emit plan-only JSON; preview loads samples (array or {samples}) and calls core preview; create computes bundle hash + signs with ed25519 key.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"CobaltCrane","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:01:15.956246036Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-02T18:50:47.489291728Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1r09","depends_on_id":"bd-1dh7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:02:19.699762263Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1r09","depends_on_id":"bd-24bc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:01:15.968285380Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1r09","depends_on_id":"bd-c0fv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:02:16.637316118Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1r09","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1n78.22","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:02:27.131086438Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-1rso","title":"[CAP] CLI reports + export","description":"# [CAP] CLI reports + export

## Goal
Expose capability usage and recommendations via CLI.

## Commands
- `fcp capabilities report` (usage + unused caps)
- `fcp capabilities suggest` (least-privilege recommendations)
- `fcp capabilities export --json`

## Output Requirements
- JSON + human outputs; stable ordering.
- Non-zero exit codes on invalid inputs.

## Tests
- Unit tests for CLI parsing and formatting (snapshots).
- Integration tests with sample telemetry data.
- Structured JSON logs for each report generation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- CLI outputs are deterministic and actionable.","notes":"Added report summary + JSON export helpers in fcp-telemetry/usage.rs with tests; CLI wiring still pending on flywheel_connectors-1n78.22.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"SilentDeer","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:07:40.704181817Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T19:09:27.160402394Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1rso","depends_on_id":"bd-2ctr","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:08:23.416445928Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1rso","depends_on_id":"bd-3iac","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:07:40.716672759Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1rso","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1n78.22","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:08:26.394922645Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1s32","title":"[IDEA-07.1] SDK Formatter helper","description":"## Goal
Implement a small formatter helper that supports HTML/Markdown rendering with fallback.

## Details
- API: `Formatter::render_with_fallback(input, mode)` returns `{rendered, parse_mode_used}`.
- Fallback path strips markup safely and escapes control chars.

## Tests
- Unit tests for well-formed vs malformed inputs.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Returns deterministic output and indicates whether fallback occurred.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BlackCrane","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:35:03.110139908Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-29T05:17:25.826947975Z","closed_at":"2026-01-29T05:17:25.826873616Z","close_reason":"Implemented formatter helper + tests","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1s32","depends_on_id":"bd-30bf","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:35:03.124534553Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-3frf","title":"[IDEA-27.2] Unit tests for fork detection","description":"## Coverage
- Single head passes.
- Forked heads detected.
- Resolution clears fork state.

## Logging
- Logs include connector_id and state head IDs.
## Logging
- Emit structured JSONL per `docs/STANDARD_Testing_Logging.md` with `test_name`, `module`, `phase`, `correlation_id`, and `result`.
- Validate with `fcp_conformance::schemas::validate_e2e_log_jsonl` (use `fcp-testkit` LogCapture in unit tests).

 {"id":"bd-3gzz","title":"[SC] Tests: unit + integration","description":"# [SC] Tests: unit + integration

## Goal
Comprehensive unit + integration coverage for attestation/SBOM verification and policy gating.

## Unit Tests
- Valid attestation/SBOM passes.
- Missing or invalid signature fails with correct error code.
- SBOM hash mismatch fails.
- Attestation predicate digest mismatch fails.
- Policy overrides (allow_unsigned, min_slsa_level) behave as configured.

## Integration Tests
- Host install gating with test connector bundles:
  - Valid bundle installs.
  - Invalid bundle rejected.
  - Policy override allows dev-only bundle.

## Logging Requirements
- Structured JSON logs for each verification step (stage, input digest, result, duration_ms).

## Acceptance Criteria
- Tests cover success/failure paths with deterministic outputs.
- Logs are stable and redact sensitive fields.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-01T02:59:32.884555519Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T05:23:36.334140145Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3gzz","depends_on_id":"bd-33no","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-01T02:59:32.898395247Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3gzz","depends_on_id":"bd-3myr","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:00:06.145592852Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3gzz","depends_on_id":"bd-3rgx","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:00:09.145328557Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"bd-3iac","title":"Capability Usage Analytics + Least-Privilege Advisor","description":"# Capability Usage Analytics + Least-Privilege Advisor

## Goal
Measure real capability usage and suggest minimal capability sets per zone/connector.

## Why
- Reduces over-provisioned capabilities.
- Enables least-privilege hardening over time.
- Provides actionable operator insights.

## Scope
- Usage telemetry collection and aggregation.
- Analyzer to recommend minimal capability sets.
- CLI reports + export for automation.

## Deliverables
- CapabilityUsage event schema and aggregation store.
- Recommendation engine with explainable rules.
- CLI reports (usage, unused, suggested reductions).
- Unit/integration tests + E2E script with structured logs.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Reports list unused capabilities and suggested reductions.
- Suggestions are deterministic, explainable, and redact sensitive data.","notes":"Reviewed fcp-core/src/telemetry.rs (CapabilityUsageEvent/Key) and fcp-telemetry/src/usage.rs (store + recommend_capabilities + report summary). No immediate code gaps without CLI wiring; next step is E2E script/fixtures once bd-1rso lands.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"WhiteDesert","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:07:05.238933010Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-02T18:43:34.265610634Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fcp2","policy","telemetry"]}

 {"id":"bd-3ioh","title":"[POL] E2E: policy bundle apply + rollback","description":"# [POL] E2E: policy bundle apply + rollback

## Goal
End-to-end script validating preview, apply, and rollback workflow.

## Script
- `e2e/policy_bundle_flow.sh` with structured JSON logs.
- Steps:
  1) Create bundle from baseline.
  2) Diff + risk summary.
  3) Preview with sample requests.
  4) Apply bundle and verify allow/deny changes.
  5) Roll back to prior bundle and verify restoration.

## Logging
- Emit JSON per step: {stage, bundle_id, result, reason_codes, duration_ms}.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Rollback restores prior behavior with verified receipt.
- Logs show deterministic diff/preview outputs.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:01:43.355114033Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T05:25:15.218894370Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3ioh","depends_on_id":"bd-1dh7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:02:53.203517530Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3ioh","depends_on_id":"bd-1r09","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:02:48.878379182Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3ioh","depends_on_id":"bd-24bc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:01:43.367931183Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3m2a","title":"TEST-CONNECTORS-LIVE: Real-service integration suites (manual)","description":"# TEST-CONNECTORS-LIVE: Real-service integration suites (manual)

## Goal
Add live integration tests for external services without mocks/fakes, using dedicated sandbox accounts.

## Scope
- Anthropic, OpenAI, Telegram, Discord, Twitter connectors.
- Real API calls with rate limits and secret handling.

## Constraints
- Must run as manual-only or gated by secrets in CI.
- No production accounts, no recording or fake fixtures.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Each connector has a live test plan and minimal smoke tests.
- Logs redact secrets and include correlation IDs and cost/latency metadata.

 {"id":"bd-3myr","title":"[SC] Attestation + SBOM object schemas","description":"# [SC] Attestation + SBOM object schemas

## Goal
Define canonical schemas and validation rules for SupplyChainAttestation and SBOM objects, including signature requirements and deterministic hashing.

## Scope
- SupplyChainAttestation schema (SLSA/in-toto style provenance) with binding to artifact digest.
- SBOM schema (CycloneDX/SPDX subset) describing components and dependencies.
- Signature requirements and trust-root binding rules.
- Canonical encoding and hash rules (stable across platforms).

## Deliverables
- Schema IDs and versions for:
  - SupplyChainAttestation: subject digest, predicate type, builder identity, buildType, materials, metadata (timestamps), slsa_level, provenance_hash.
  - SBOM: bom_format, bom_version, tool chain, component list (name, version, hashes, licenses), dependency graph.
- Canonical encoding rules (CBOR canonical + JSON canonical) and hashing algorithm selection.
- Validation rules: required fields, allowed predicate types, builder allowlist hooks.

## Tests
- Golden vectors for valid/invalid attestations and SBOMs.
- Deterministic hash tests (same semantic input -> same hash).
- Schema rejection tests for missing/extra fields.

## Logging Requirements
- Structured JSON logs for schema validation and hash determinism checks:
  - {test, schema_id, vector_id, result, duration_ms}.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Schemas are versioned, deterministic, and validated by conformance tooling.
- Encoding + hash outputs are stable across runs/OSes.
- Invalid/unsigned objects fail closed with clear error codes.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"MistyFalcon","created_at":"2026-02-01T02:58:57.665118567Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T05:50:33.192876322Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3myr","depends_on_id":"bd-33no","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-01T02:58:57.678114036Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
